content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 30, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 30, 2026, focused on dependency management and infrastructure improvements. The team processed several updates to AI SDKs and database configurations, while new community proposals were introduced regarding agent reputation systems and service integration for Hive Civilization.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Dependency Updates**
*   Updated core AI SDK dependencies to maintain compatibility and performance:
    *   `@anthropic-ai/sdk` to ^0.92.0 ([#7218](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7218))
    *   `ai` to v6.0.172 ([#7217](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7217))
    *   `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` to v4.0.25 ([#7216](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7216))
    *   `@ai-sdk/provider` to v3.0.10 ([#7215](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7215))
    *   `@ai-sdk/openai` to v3.0.55 ([#7214](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7214))

**Infrastructure & Self-Hosting**
*   Improved self-hosted deployment capabilities, including CORS support, bearer authentication, and cross-platform build fixes ([#7212](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7212)).
*   Updated the `supabase/postgres` Docker tag to v17.6.1.113 ([#7219](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7219)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7219](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7219): chore(deps): update supabase/postgres docker tag to v17.6.1.113
*   [#7218](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7218): fix(deps): update dependency @anthropic-ai/sdk to ^0.92.0
*   [#7217](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7217): chore(deps): update dependency ai to v6.0.172
*   [#7216](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7216): chore(deps): update dependency @ai-sdk/provider-utils to v4.0.25
*   [#7215](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7215): chore(deps): update dependency @ai-sdk/provider to v3.0.10
*   [#7214](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7214): chore(deps): update dependency @ai-sdk/openai to v3.0.55
*   [#7212](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7212): feat(self-hosted): CORS + bearer auth + cross-platform build fixes

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES

**Agent Ecosystem & Integration**
*   [#7211](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7211): Proposal for Hive Civilization integration, enabling character-callable x402 services on Base mainnet.
*   [#7213](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7213): Proposal to integrate SwarmScore, a portable trust and reputation rating system for AI agents.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
